modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks Spanish as their first language.
You should write the description in short fragmented statements and use a casual conversational tone. The writing should have excessive unnecessary detail and show moderate technical familiarity. There should be no spelling errors and some redundant repeated information.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Trouble adding rooms to a location in TeamDynamix Assets/Cls.

full_description_text:  
So, I was trying to add some rooms to a location in the Assets/Cls app. You know, the one in TeamDynamix? It just wouldn’t let me do it. I clicked around, but nothing happened. I really need those rooms added, but it seems like the app is not cooperating at all.
short_description: Trouble adding rooms to a location in TeamDynamix Assets/Cls.
